kernel_of_truth: The SAA southern boundary (~45-50°S at the 32,000 nT contour) does fall within the Roaring 40s wind belt (40-50°S). The latitude overlap is a real observational fact; where the logic breaks is claiming a causal connection from a spatial coincidence when the longitude extents (global vs ~130°) are completely different.
